title: Manufacturing Engineer - Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions:
Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions!
